_meta.note: S9b TRIGGER A RESOLUTION 2026-07-19 (manual session with Magic): sig-089 BTCUSDT LONG -> EXPIRED_NO_ENTRY. Entry zone 63673.63-63840.80 never touched (post-pub min low 63963.00 @ 13:35Z 07-18); price crossed TP1 64274.47 pre-trigger @ bar 17:10Z 07-18 and TP2 @ 17:40Z, rallied to 64967 - thesis consumed without a position. Full record in results_log.jsonl (rr 0, event-bar timestamps). NEXT RUN (trw2-crypto-sun-mid 14:00 UK): BTC=1 weekend guarantee requires a FRESH BTC scan and new card on current structure (S9b Trigger A pkt 5) - do not resurrect sig-089 levels. New rules S9b active: Trigger A (session-start expiry of stale pendings incl. TP1-crossed-pre-trigger) + Trigger B (SL/TP touch -> immediate close with bar timestamp + same-run fresh scan + new card); par.9a expiry remains fallback only.

scenario_schema.sl_update_direction_rule: reduce_risk_only: LONG -> new_sl > current_sl AND new_sl < entry_lower; SHORT -> new_sl < current_sl AND new_sl > entry_upper
scenario_schema.screenshot_m15_path_doc: Path to the §7b M15 standard screenshot. Must be <id>_m15_standard_<ts>.png with companion _meta.json (TF=15, has_entry_box, has_sl_line, has_tp_lines). Written by bar-walk after capture_screenshot. H1 or non-standard screenshots must NOT be stored here -- use null until §7b is run.

flags_doc.applied: set true once trigger fires -- prevents re-application
flags_doc.one_shot: always true -- each scenario fires at most once
flags_doc.disabled: set true by mutually_exclusive_with when a sibling fires
flags_doc.mutually_exclusive_with: list of scenario keys to disable when this one fires

scenario_schema.precondition_doc: optional -- a bar matching precondition type/level must appear BEFORE the main trigger bar (chronological order)
